package rulefixtures

// scenario for nested_linear_join_map_candidate: Nested-loop lookups or joins that could use a map index for O(1) access.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule358PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario358Positive(records []Rule358PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
